title: AWeber vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare AWeber and Omnisend email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, ratings and find the best fit for your business.
h1: AWeber vs Omnisend: Detailed Feature and Price Comparison
intro: AWeber and Omnisend are both popular email marketing platforms offering freemium models, but they serve different audiences. AWeber caters to bloggers and solopreneurs seeking simplicity, while Omnisend targets e-commerce businesses wanting integrated email and SMS capabilities. This comparison will help you determine which platform best aligns with your marketing needs and budget.
choose_a_if: You're a blogger or solopreneur prioritizing email simplicity and affordability
You need RSS-to-email functionality and landing pages built-in
You want a larger free tier with up to 500 subscribers before upgrading
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and need both email and SMS marketing channels
You want pre-built workflows and advanced segmentation for omnichannel campaigns
You prefer higher user ratings (4.5 G2, 4.6 Trustpilot) and proven e-commerce integration

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your use case. AWeber excels for content creators and solopreneurs seeking simplicity, while Omnisend is superior for e-commerce brands needing integrated SMS and advanced automation. Omnisend has higher overall ratings on both G2 and Trustpilot.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Omnisend?
faq.a: Both platforms start at virtually the same paid price ($15 vs $16/month), but AWeber offers a more generous free tier with 500 subscribers compared to Omnisend's 250. For budget-conscious users, AWeber's larger free tier provides better value initially.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email campaigns. However, switching may require manual setup of automations and workflows, as they use different systems. Plan migration carefully to avoid losing data or disrupting active campaigns.
